nasb.text: He named the first Jemimah, and the second Keziah, and the third Keren-happuch.

esv.text: And he called the name of the first daughter Jemimah, and the name of the second Keziah, and the name of the third Keren-happuch.

cnv.text: 他給長女起名叫耶米瑪，次女名叫基洗亞，三女名叫基連．哈樸。

ccb.text: 他给长女取名叫耶米玛、次女叫基洗亚、三女叫基连·哈朴。
